# Strange Harvest (2025)

> Strange Harvest is a horror mockumentary film following detectives investigating the ritualistic murders of the serial killer known as Mr. Shiny. Directed by Stuart Ortiz. Streaming now on Hulu (US) and Paramount+ (Canada).

## Key Pages

- [Official Website](https://strangeharvestmovie.com/): The official home for Strange Harvest (2025)
- [Official Trailer](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tYyTpuk8Zuk): Watch the official trailer on YouTube
- [Press & Reviews](https://strangeharvestmovie.com/#press): Critical coverage and press mentions
- [Cast & Crew](https://strangeharvestmovie.com/#cast): Full cast and production crew
- [Spanish Version](https://strangeharvestmovie.com/es): Official site in Spanish (Los asesinatos de Mr. Shiny)
- [Behind the Scenes](https://strangeharvestmovie.com/bts.html): Behind the scenes photos and materials

## Streaming

- [Stream on Hulu (US)](https://www.hulu.com/movie/strange-harvest-e931d642-fe34-4b92-b6da-96f4c7573fac): Available with Hulu subscription
- [Stream on Paramount+ (Canada)](https://www.paramountplus.com/ca/movies/video/_rwhlpI_KPDSpgSqI41q70Q6VVwGC2lG/): Available with Paramount+ subscription
- [Rent on Apple TV](https://tv.apple.com/us/movie/strange-harvest/umc.cmc.4atgf8qjfghsw0w6ki9k7eqch): Available for rental
- [Rent on Amazon Prime Video](https://www.primevideo.com/detail/Strange-Harvest/0GOLHLOCIIRVMO44IB2E0LMNN2): Available for rental
